[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0010101 3
1 0000000 a
2 1010010 3
3 0000000 a
4 1100010 3
5 1111100 5
6 1001110 4
7 0100101 3

12 21 1100010 3 match 4

56 65 1110001 4
67 76 1000001 2
70 07 1000111 4
